reviews.review_msg: 2 big video-recorded assignments (40% each), but they weren't as challenging as expected and forced you to engage with the reading material! Lectures were interesting and his quizzes/worksheets (due every class) were pretty much free marks. Enjoyed this class, he seems very caring and knowledgeable.

I enjoyed taking this class. He really cares about his students, and the class structure is flexible. You can miss up to two classes. We were also given bonus assignments at the end. There were two major assignments, and both were really easy. TAKE THIS CLASS!!

Ryan was probably my favourite professor in my entire undergrad! If you are still deciding on taking his class, DO IT. The class was very interesting, consisting of weekly quizzes at the end of class and weekly worksheets based on that week's article. We also had 2 critical reviews worth 40% each. ABSOLUTELY LOVE HIM. TAKE HIS CLASS!!

Professor Ryan is an amazing prof! The workload is straightforward, and he provides clear rubrics so you always know where you stand. During class, he shares specific tips on how to do the assignments, which is very helpful. His lectures are engaging and it is easy to stay focused. If he's teaching a class you need, definitely take it.

Ryan is one of my fav profs at SFU. Class was mainly graded on two critical reviews and along with some quizzes and worksheets. He gives you guidance on how to critique the articles, and gives tips on how to write it. Super helpful, great lectures, and it made the papers easier to write. Make sure to do the readings and worksheets youl be fine!

Ryan is a great prof, super fun and attentive to students. Our class was based on weekly quizzes, four critical reviews from weekly readings and two major papers. He would guide us through the material and how to write and critically analyze articles, which was super helpful. 1000/10 recommend.

took 268 with him spring 2023, now taking 376 spring 2024. absolute favourite prof I've ever had. so charismatic and a great lecturer, keeps up with communication and always makes sure assessments are fair. ryan is literally my celebrity crush and i want him to teach more courses so i can take them with him. ryan if you see this, i love you *mwah*

Would NOT recommend this prof. Lacks empathy, will not help you if you are struggling with personal issues. Exams r way harder than shud be for 2nd year. All ur grade relies on his exams. Would rather find ANY other prof. Worst prof in all of my uni experience. Do not waste ur $ and time.
